message:
fix(core): fix interval_tree remove_at equal-key navigation after AVL rotations (ft-3n8sp)

After AVL rotations, nodes with equal low endpoints can end up in either
subtree. remove_at only searched left for equal keys, silently failing
to remove nodes that rotated into the right subtree. Add subtree_contains
helper to check both subtrees when keys are equal.

Also fix proptest_workflows_expanded duplicate pane_id edge case where
try_acquire_group self-conflicts on duplicate IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
 # It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 1f874af39f2b78f6a7d94687a251dfaac91cf57ba422acacf75ee58c7f9e5b9e # shrinks to intervals = [(Interval { low: 429, high: 501 }, 0)]
+cc 60144304210cd45fab0229d59f5865fb291a2aadc2dfb761ebb61240bf858b37 # shrinks to intervals = [(Interval { low: 933, high: 934 }, 0), (Interval { low: 933, high: 934 }, 0), (Interval { low: 0, high: 1 }, 0)]

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 3e4eb990e3675d264e74bbe3c3ef4cff17ab8540c143e5fae7f3e8ac2d3ec959 # shrinks to pane_ids = [77, 77]
